[[BLOCK:slide39_shape0]]
•   These variables are inter-related. Traditional OLS Regression (Ordinary Least Squares regression) assumes the absence of Multi-collinearity (Multi-collinearity), as strong inter-relationships among predictors can lead to model instability. However, this issue does not affect penalized regression methods.  
•   Total cholesterol  
•   LDL (Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol): "bad" cholesterol  
•   HDL (High-density lipoprotein cholesterol): "good" cholesterol  
•   TCH (Triglycerides): fats carried in the blood, derived from the food we consume. Excess calories, alcohol, or sugar are converted into TCH and stored in fat cells.  
•   LTG: Low Triglycerides
